programs.title: Across the Universe
programs.desc: 1960s.Young Briton Jude (Jim Sturgess) goes to the United States in search of his father, whom he has never known before.The man is said to be a university lecturer.However, he turns out to be an ordinary worker.There, Jude meets a teenage American girl, Lucy (Evan Rachel Wood).They both fall in love with each other at first sight.Soon, Lucy's brother, Max (Joe Anderson), is drafted and goes to war in Vietnam.Meanwhile, Jude and Lucy, along with a group of friends and musicians, engage in anti-war activities.Their guides are: Dr. Robert (Bono) and Mr. Kite (Eddie Izzard).Together they fight for freedom of speech and civil rights.However, the tense situation is not favorable for lovers.Adversity tears them apart.They have to overcome many obstacles to be together again.The film's soundtrack included several songs by the legendary band The Beatles.The film was nominated for a Golden Globe (Best Musical) and an Oscar (Best Costume Design).

programs.title: Rooster
programs.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programs.title: Comeback 3
programs.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programs.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programs.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman
